# CrankMart
> South Africa's first dedicated online cycling marketplace and business directory.

CrankMart connects cyclists with bike shops, cycling brands, coaches, events,
trail centres, clubs, and services across South Africa.

## About
- Full name: CrankMart
- URL: https://crankmart.com
- Founded: 2026
- Country: South Africa
- Category: Online Marketplace, Business Directory, Cycling
- Operated by: H10 Holdings (Pty) Ltd

## What CrankMart Does
- Business listings for cycling shops, brands, and services across SA
- Classified ads for new and second-hand bikes, gear, and parts
- Cycling events calendar for South Africa
- Trail and route guides for SA cyclists
- Cycling club directory

## Target Audience
South African cyclists — road, MTB, gravel, e-bike, BMX, triathlon

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://crankmart.com
- Browse shops: https://crankmart.com/shops
- Cycling events: https://crankmart.com/events
- Buy/sell bikes: https://crankmart.com/classifieds
- Blog: https://crankmart.com/blog
- List your business: https://crankmart.com/list

## Contact
- Email: info@crankmart.com
- Social: @crankmartsa (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok)

## Keywords
cycling, bike shops South Africa, cycling marketplace SA, MTB South Africa,
road cycling SA, cycling events South Africa, cycling gear, second hand bikes SA,
cycling coach, Cape Town cycling, cycling clubs South Africa
